product_intelligence.name: Product Discovery Agent
product_intelligence.goal: Find high-potential products using TikTok, Reddit, web, and URL signals.

competitor_intelligence.name: Competitor Intel Agent
competitor_intelligence.goal: Expose competitor weaknesses, pricing gaps, and market saturation.

product_sourcing.goal: Find margin-optimized suppliers on Alibaba, AliExpress, and CJ Dropshipping.

meta_ads_spy.name: Ad Creative Agent

commerce_creation.name: Store Builder Agent
commerce_creation.goal: Design premium Shopify OS 2.0 themes with cohesive visual systems, conversion copy, and editorial imagery.
